title: sphenomeris scoparia
intro: Sphenomeris scoparia, also known as the Chinese club moss or Lycopodium, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphenomeris scoparia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and bronchitis, and improving respiratory function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
